lines.label: herd
lines.detail: `herd` units may differ in average outcome. It uses 1 covariance parameter for intercept. The data contain 15 `herd` levels, with at least 1 rows per level (median 4). Within-group support was not assessed for `intercept`. The grouping-level information is sufficient under the current audit thresholds. Formula detail: `(1 | herd)`.
